description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of injured Survivors being healed or healing themselves are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: A Nurse's Calling

description: While carrying a Survivor, Agitation activates: Increases your Carrying speed by {percentage}%. Increases your Terror Radius by +12 metres.
name: Agitation

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor, Alien Instinct activates: The Aura of the farthest Survivor from your current location who is in the Injured State is revealed to you for 8 seconds. Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Alien Instinct

description: After falling from a height, All-Shaking Thunder activates for {duration} seconds: Increases the range of your Lunge Attack by +75 %. All-Shaking Thunder has a cool-down of 5 seconds.
name: All-Shaking Thunder

description: While carrying a Survivor, you benefit from the following effect: The Auras of other Survivors within {range} metres of your location are revealed to you.
name: Awakened Awareness

description: You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Vaulting speed by {percentage}%. Whenever you vault a Window, Bamboozle calls upon The Entity for the following effect: Blocks it to all Survivors for {duration} seconds. Vaulting it again within that time resets the timer. Vaulting a different one transfers the effect to it instead. Bamboozle does not extend its effects to vaulting a dropped Pallet.
name: Bamboozle

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: A deep bond with The Entity unlocks potential in one's Aura-reading ability. After hooking a Survivor, all Survivors who are at least {range} metres away from that Hook have their Aura revealed to you for 5 seconds.
name: Barbecue & Chilli

description: While within 16 metres of a completed Generator, you benefit from the following effect: Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect. This effect lingers for {duration} second(s).
name: Batteries Included

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Whenever you trigger the Bloodlust Status Effect, Beast of Prey activates for {duration} seconds: Grants the Undetectable Status Effect.
name: Beast of Prey

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Generator is completed, Bitter Murmur triggers its primary effect: The Auras of any Survivors within 16 metres of that Generator are revealed to you for 5 seconds. Once the last Generator is completed, Bitter Murmur triggers its secondary effect: The Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Bitter Murmur

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor, Blood Echo triggers its effect: Causes all Survivors in the Injured State to suffer from the Exhausted and Haemorrhage Status Effects for {duration} seconds.
name: Blood Echo

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: As soon as at least one Exit Gate is opened, Blood Warden activates: The Auras of Survivors are revealed to you, whenever they are inside the Exit Gate. Once per Trial, hooking a Survivor while Blood Warden is active calls upon The Entity to trigger the following effect: Blocks all opened Exit Gates for {duration} seconds, preventing any remaining Survivor from leaving the Trial through them.
name: Blood Warden

description: Bloodhound causes the following effects: Pools of Blood left by injured Survivors appear in bright red. Extends their lifetime by {duration} seconds.
name: Bloodhound

description: While performing the Break or Damage action on Breakable Walls, Pallets, or Generators, Brutal Strength triggers its effect: Increases the Action speed by {percentage}%.
name: Brutal Strength

description: After performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator, Call of Brine applies its effects to it for 70 seconds: Increases its Regression speed to {percentage}% of the default value. Highlights its Aura to you in yellow. Triggers a Loud Noise Notification whenever a Survivor succeeds a Good Skill Check while repairing it.
name: Call of Brine

description: Your prayers invoke a dark power that meddles with the Survivors' chances of survival. At the start of the Trial, the 3 Generators located farthest from you are blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds. Corrupt Intervention deactivates prematurely once the first Survivor is put into the Dying State.
name: Corrupt Intervention

description: Survivors inside your Terror Radius suffer from the following effects: Reduces all Healing speeds by {percentage}%. Increases the Pointer-Rotation speed of Healing Skill Checks by +50 %.
name: Coulrophobia

description: As the end nears, you go in for the kill. Whenever a Generator is completed, Coup de Grâce gains +2 Tokens, up to a maximum of 10 Tokens per Trial: Increases the range of your next Lunge Attack by {percentage}%, while consuming -1 Token. Coup de Grâce can only hold a maximum of 5 Tokens at a time.
name: Coup de Grace

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, Cruel Limits triggers its effect for {duration} seconds: Blocks all Windows for all Survivors. The Auras of the Blocked Windows are revealed to you and highlighted in yellow.
name: Cruel Limits

description: Each time you hook a Survivor other than your Obsession, you gain +1 Token: For as long as the Obsession is alive, all other Survivors suffer from a stack-able {percentage}% per Token Action Speed penalty to Repairing, Healing, and Sabotaging, up to a maximum of {percentage2}% or 11 Tokens. The Obsession is unaffected by this penalty and instead granted a permanent +33 % Action Speed bonus to Unhooking and Healing other Survivors. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Cull the Weak

description: Whenever you are vaulting a Window, you benefit from the following effect: Increases the Vaulting speed by {percentage}%. Whenever you are stunned with a Pallet or blinded by any means, you suffer from the following effects: Reduces the Recovery speed from Pallet Stuns by -15 %. Increases the duration of Killer Blinds by +15 %.
name: Dark Arrogance

description: Whenever the Obsession becomes injured by any means, Dark Devotion activates for {duration} seconds: Transfers your Terror Radius to the Obsession. This Terror Radius is set to 40 metres. Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Dark Devotion

description: Searching a Locker has the following effect: The Auras of Survivors within 8 metres of any Locker are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Darkness Revealed has a cool-down of 30 seconds.
name: Darkness Revealed

description: After hooking a Survivor, Dead Man's Switch triggers its effect: Blocks the first Generator any Survivor stops repairing for {duration} seconds. The Blocked Generator is highlighted to you in white. Dead Man's Switch cannot activate if its effect is still active from a previous activation.
name: Dead Man's Switch

description: Each time a Generator is completed, No Holds Barred calls upon The Entity for the following effects: Blocks the Generator with the most Progression for {duration} seconds. The Aura of the Blocked Generator is highlighted to you in white.
name: No Holds Barred

description: Whenever a Survivor finishes healing another Survivor for the equivalent of 1 Health State, Deathbound activates: Causes the Healer to scream and reveal their location. Causes the Healer to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect whenever they are farther than {range} metres from the other Survivor. The Healer sees the Aura of the Healed Survivor while Deathbound is active. Deathbound deactivates after the Healer loses a Health State.
name: Deathbound

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Survivor reads your Aura, Deerstalker activates for the same duration as their Aura-reading action: The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you. Furthermore, the following effect triggers automatically every {duration} seconds: Your Aura is revealed for 3 seconds to the Survivor with currently the lowest cumulative Chase time.
name: Deerstalker

description: Any Generator within a range of {range} metres that is being repaired by 2 or more Survivors is marked by a yellow Aura. When the Generator is first highlighted, Discordance triggers a Loud Noise Notification on the Generator. After the Generator is no longer within range or is being repaired by just 1 Survivor, the highlighted Aura will linger for another 4 seconds.
name: Discordance

description: After 3 seconds of injuring a Survivor by any means, Dissolution activates for {duration} seconds: Instantly breaks the next Pallet that Survivor performs a Fast Vault across while inside your Terror Radius.
name: Dissolution

description: You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Terror Radius by {percentage}%.
name: Distressing

description: The power you wield over the land strikes terror in the hearts of all who cross your path. The first time each Chest and each Totem are interacted with by a Survivor, Dominance triggers its effect: Calls upon The Entity to block it for {duration} seconds. The Aura of the blocked Prop is revealed to you in white.
name: Dominance

description: After performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator, Dragon's Grip activates for 30 seconds. While active, the first Survivor interacting with that Generator suffers from the following effects: Causes them to scream and reveal their location for 4 seconds. Inflicts the Exposed Status Effect for 60 seconds. Dragon's Grip has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Dragon's Grip

description: You benefit from the following effect: Reduces the duration of Pallet Stuns by {percentage}%. This effect does not apply when stunned while carrying a Survivor.
name: Enduring

description: Performing the Damage Generator action on Generators highlights their Auras in yellow. Whenever a Survivor enters the Dying State by any means, Eruption triggers the following effects on all highlighted Generators: Causes them to explode, damaging them. Instantly regresses them by -10 % of their total Progression. Causes them to start regressing afterwards. Causes all Survivors currently repairing them to suffer from the following effects: Causes them to scream. Their Auras are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Eruption has a cool-down of 30 seconds after triggering its effects, which also resets the highlighted Auras.
name: Eruption

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: The increased pressure of losing your preys fills you with anger and gives you unsuspected motivation. For each completed Generator, Fire Up gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: Increases the Action speeds for the following interactions by a stack-able {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%: Picking up and dropping Survivors. Breaking Breakable Walls and dropped Pallets. Damaging Generators. Vaulting Windows.
name: Fire Up

description: Whenever a Survivor is put into the Dying State by any means, Forced Hesitation triggers its effect: Causes all other Survivors within 16 metres of them suffer from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 10 seconds. Forced Hesitation has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Forced Hesitation

description: Whenever a Survivor triggers a Protection Hit, they suffer from the following effect: Inflicts the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Forced Penance

description: Whenever a Survivors takes damage, Forever Entwined gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens: Increases the Action speeds for Dropping, Hooking, and Picking up a Survivor by a stack-able +4 % per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage}%.
name: Forever Entwined

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Survivors hit with your vicious Basic Attack drop any equipped Item on impact: The Auras of lost Items are revealed to within {range} metres.
name: Franklin's Demise

description: When you hook any Survivors that is not the Obsession, the following effects apply to the Obsession: Their Aura is revealed for {duration} seconds. They suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 20 seconds. When you hook the Obsession, the following effects apply to a random Survivor: Causes the Survivor to scream and reveal their location to the Killer. They become the new Obsession. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Friends 'til the End

description: After hooking the Obsession, you benefit from the following effects for {duration} seconds: Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. Grants a +10 % Haste Status Effect. Whenever the Obsession is unhooked by another Survivor, the Obsession Status transfers to their Rescuer. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Furtive Chase

description: Whenever you hit the Survivor with currently the highest cumulative Chase time with a Basic Attack, Game Afoot triggers its primary effect: Causes the Obsession Status to transfer to that Survivor. While chasing the Obsession, performing the Break or Damage action causes Game Afoot to trigger its secondary effect: Grants a +7 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Game Afoot

description: After a Survivor loses a Health State, Gearhead activates for 30 seconds: While Gearhead is active, a Survivor succeeding a Good Skill Check while repairing reveals their Aura to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Gearhead

description: Whenever a Survivor loses a Health State by any means, Genetic Limits triggers its effect: Causes them to suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Genetic Limits

description: Your act of servitude to The Entity has not gone unnoticed. Each time a Survivor is hooked for the first time, Grim Embrace gains +1 Token and activates once you are at least 16 metres away from the Hook: 1-3 Tokens: Blocks all Generators for {duration} seconds. 4 Tokens: Blocks all Generators for 40 seconds and the Aura of the Obsession is revealed to you for 6 seconds.
name: Grim Embrace

description: Whenever a Survivor stops opening an Exit Gate after accumulating at least 80 % Progression towards being opened, Haywire causes it to regress: Regresses at a rate of {percentage}% of the normal Gate-Opening speed. Causes Survivors to see the lights atop the switch flickering randomly while it regresses.
name: Haywire

description: After performing the Damage Generator action, Help Wanted activates: Causes that Generator to become a Compromised Generator. Once the Compromised Generator is completed, you benefit from the following effect for {duration} seconds: Increases the Recovery speed of successful Basic Attacks by +25 %.
name: Help Wanted

description: Hex: Blood Favour lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial, cursing Survivors with its Hex Effects. Whenever a Survivor loses a Health State by any means, Hex: Blood Favour triggers its effect for 15 seconds: Blocks all upright Pallets within {range} metres of that Survivor. Blocked Pallets cannot be dropped by any Survivor. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Blood Favour

description: Whenever a Survivors performs a Rushed Vault action at a Window, Hex: Crowd Control activates on a random Totem and triggers its effect: Blocks that Window for all Survivors. Increases basic-vault speed of blocked Windows by 15 % Reveals auras of blocked Windows within 24 metres Hex: Crowd Control has a limit of {value} Windows it can affect at a time. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Crowd Control

description: Hex: Devour Hope lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial, cursing Survivors with its Hex Effects. Whenever a Survivor is unhooked at least 24 metres from your location, Hex: Devour Hope gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: At 2 Tokens: 10 seconds after hooking a Survivor, you are granted a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds. At 3 Tokens: Afflicts all Survivors with the Exposed Status Effect. At 5 Tokens: Unlocks the Kill ability, allowing you to kill dying Survivors by your own hands. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Devour Hope

description: If there is still a Dull Totem in the environment, Hex: Face the Darkness lights a Hex Totem after injuring a Survivor by any means, cursing them with its Hex Effects. While cursed, the following effects trigger once every {duration} seconds on all other Survivors outside of the Terror Radius: Causes them to scream. Their Auras are revealed to you for 2 seconds. Hex: Face the Darkness is deactivated once the Cursed Survivor either returns to Healthy or enters the Dying State by any means, extinguishing the Hex Totem. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Face the Darkness

description: If there is still a Dull Totem in the environment, Hex: Fortune's Fool lights a Hex Totem whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, cursing them with its Hex Effects. Inflicts the Oblivious Status Effect. Blocks the Hex Totem for all other Survivors for 90 seconds. Blocked Hex Totems cannot be cleansed or blessed by Survivors. This does not affect the Cursed Survivor. The Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to the Cursed Survivor within {range} metres. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Fortune's Fool

description: Hex: Haunted Ground lights 2 Hex Totems at the start of the Trial, laying a trap for Survivors. Blessing or cleansing either Hex Totem trips the trap and triggers the following effect: Causes all Survivors to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Hex: Haunted Ground extinguishes the second Hex Totem after tripping its trap. Hex: Haunted Ground is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after triggering its effect.
name: Hex: Haunted Ground

description: The first time you hook any Survivor, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem, provided that a Dull Totem remains in the Trial Grounds. Generators are highlighted; the intensity of the generator's Auras reveals their repair progress. As soon as a total of 4 generators have been completed in the Trial: All remaining generators explode, lose {percentage}% progess, and start regressing. The associated Hex Totem becomes dull, and this perk becomes disabled for the remainder of the trial. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Hive Mind

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions suffer from the following effect: Increases the Progression penalty for Failed Skill Checks by {percentage}%. Each time a Survivor is hooked, Hex: Huntress Lullaby grows in power and gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions suffer from the following additional effect: Reduces the time between the audio cue announcing an imminent Skill Check and it appearing, depending on the number of accumulated Tokens: 1 Token: -14 % 2 Tokens: -28 % 3 Tokens: -42 % 4 Tokens: -56 % 5 Tokens: Suppresses the audio cue altogether. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Huntress Lullaby

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, if there is still a Dull Totem remaining in the environment, Hex: No One Escapes Death activates and lights it: Grants a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect. Causes all Survivors to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. Once the Status Effect is revealed to Survivors, Hex: No One Escapes Death triggers the following effect: The Aura of its Hex Totem is revealed to all Survivors within 4 metres. This range gradually expands to 24 metres over the course of 30 seconds. Hex: No One Escapes Death remains inactive if no Dull Totems are available. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: No One Escapes Death

description: After damaging Survivors a total of 8 times with Basic Attacks, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem, cursing all Survivors: Survivors damaged by a Basic Attack suffer from a -5 % Hindered Status Effect for {duration} seconds. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Nothing but Misery

description: Creates a Hex Totem that curses the farthest Generator from its location: The Aura of the Cursed Generator is highlighted in yellow. When a Survivor repairs the Cursed Generator for at least 5 seconds, Hex: Overture of Doom triggers the following effects for {duration} seconds: Transfers your Terror Radius to the Cursed Generator. This Terror Radius is set to 32 metres. Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. Once the Cursed Generator is repaired, the next farthest Generator becomes cursed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Overture of Doom

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of cleansed Totems are revealed to you in white. Press the Interaction button over the remains of a cleansed Totem to resurrect it as a Rekindled Totem. For each Rekindled Totem, Hex: Pentimento gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: 1 Token: Reduces the Action speeds for Healing and Repairing by -20 %. 2 to 5 Tokens: Increase the strength of the Action Speed penalty by a stackable {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Survivors cursed by Hex: Pentimento see the Auras of Rekindled Totems within 16 metres. Once Hex: Pentimento has reached its limit of 5 Tokens, it calls upon The Entity for the following effect: Blocks all Rekindled Totems for the remainder of the Trial. Totems may only be rekindled once per Trial, with The Entity consuming the remains of Rekindled Totems once they are cleansed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Pentimento

description: Whenever a Survivor blesses or cleanses a Totem, Hex: Retribution triggers its primary effect: Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Whenever a Hex Totem is removed by any means, including its own, Hex: Retribution triggers its secondary effect: The Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for 20 seconds. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Retribution

description: All Generators not currently being repaired experience the following effect: Causes them to automatically regress at {percentage}% of the default Regression rate. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Ruin

description: The last {value} Survivors you hit with a Basic or Special Attack suffer permanently from the Blindness Status Effect. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: The Third Seal

description: Start the Trial with 5 Tokens, one for each Totem located in the environment: Reduces the Action speeds for Blessing and Cleansing by a stack-able {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Hex: Thrill of the Hunt loses -1 Token whenever a Totem is cleansed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Thrill of the Hunt

description: Anytime you are stunned or blinded by any Survivor a total of {value} times, and if there is not yet a Hex Totem already associated with Hex: Two Can Play and there is at least one Dull Totem remaining in the Trial Grounds, Hex: Two Can Play activates on a random Totem: Blinds all Survivors who stun or blind you for 1.5 seconds. This does not affect carried Survivors. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Two Can Play

description: Whenever a Survivor is within {range} metres of a Dull Totem, Hex: Undying triggers its primary effect: Their Aura is revealed to you for as long as they remain in that range. Whenever a Hex Totem is cleansed, Hex: Undying triggers its secondary effect: Transfers the cleansed Hex to the Hex Totem associated with Hex: Undying instead, replacing it. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Undying

description: You see your victim from afar and resolve to prolong their suffering. After a Generator is completed, Hex: Wretched Fate activates and lights a random Dull Totem, cursing the Obsession: Reduces their Repair speed by {percentage}%. The Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to them within 12 metres.
name: Hex: Wretched Fate

description: You protect what little you have and are perceptive to those rummaging through your stockpiles. Hoarder triggers a Loud Noise Notification for 4 seconds, whenever a Survivor performs any of the following actions within {range} metres of your location: Unlocks a Chest. Picks up any Item. Hoarder spawns 2 additional Chests in the Trial.
name: Hoarder

description: Whenever a Survivor stuns you by any means, Hubris triggers its effect: Causes them to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Hubris has a cool-down of 20 seconds.
name: Hubris

description: One can always rely on the avarice of the living and use it to one's advantage. Grants the ability to kick opened Chests and close them. The Auras of unopened Chests are revealed to you at all times. The Auras of Survivors coming within 8 metres of unopened or closed Chests are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Human Greed has a cool-down of 10 seconds on the ability to kick Chests.
name: Human Greed

description: Whenever you injure a healthy Survivor, Hysteria triggers its effect: Causes all Survivors currently in the Injured State to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds. This effect also applies the Survivor triggering it. Hysteria has a cool-down of 20 seconds.
name: Hysteria

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Rushed Vault action within 48 metres of your location, you benefit from the following effect: The Aura of the Survivor is revealed to you for 8 seconds. I'm All Ears has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: I'm All Ears

description: Whenever a Survivor is put into the Dying State by any means, all other Survivors within your Terror Radius will scream and reveal their current location to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Infectious Fright

description: Unlocks the stealth ability. After standing still for {duration} second(s), Insidious activates for as long as you remain stationary: Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. Insidious deactivates once you start moving again.
name: Insidious

description: While carrying a Survivor, they suffer from the following effects: Reduces the strength of the Involuntary Strafing caused by their wiggling by -75 %. Increases the time required to break free from your grasp by {percentage}%.
name: Iron Grasp

description: While interacting with an empty Locker, Iron Maiden applies its primary effect: Increases your Search speed by {percentage}%. Whenever a Survivor exits a Locker, Iron Maiden triggers its secondary effects: Causes them to scream and trigger a Loud Noise Notification at their current location. This effect lingers for 4 seconds. Causes them to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 30 seconds.
name: Iron Maiden

description: Whenever a Survivor moves farther than 6 metres from a Pallet within 6 seconds of dropping it, Knock Out triggers its effect: Causes them to suffer from a -5 % Hindered Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Knock Out

description: When a Survivor scares off a Crow within 36 metres of your location, Languid Touch activates: Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Languid Touch has a cool-down of 5 seconds.
name: Languid Touch

description: At the start of the Trial, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Extends the duration of all instances of a Survivor Aura being revealed to you by +2 seconds. Lethal Pursuer benefits from its own effect.
name: Lethal Pursuer

description: Whenever a Survivor performs an Unhook action, they suffer from the following effect for 60 seconds: Reduces their Healing speeds by {percentage}%.
name: Leverage

description: Unlike other beasts of The Fog, you have adapted to light. The Auras of Survivors attempting to blind you by any means are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Grants immunity from being blinded from Flashlights, Firecrackers, Flash Grenades, and Blast Mine.
name: Lightborn

description: After performing the Damage Generator action, Machine Learning activates: Causes that Generator to become a Compromised Generator. Damaging another Generator transfers the state to it instead. The Aura of the Compromised Generator is highlighted to you in yellow until it is completed. Once the Compromised Generator is completed, you benefit from the following effects for {duration} seconds: Undetectable Status Effect +8 % Haste Status Effect Machine Learning deactivates after use.
name: Machine Learning

description: Whenever you are carrying a Survivor, Mad Grit activates: Removes the Cool-down of missed Basic Attacks. Pauses the Wiggle Progression of the carried Survivor for {duration} seconds each time you successfully hit another Survivor.
name: Mad Grit

description: Whenever a Survivor is rescued from a Hook, while you are farther than 32 metres away, Make Your Choice activates: Causes the unhooking Survivor to scream and reveal their location to you. Causes them to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Make Your Choice has a cooldown of {duration2} seconds.
name: Make Your Choice

description: Whenever a Generator reaches 90 % of Repair progression, Merciless Storm triggers its effect: All Survivors repairing that Generator are faced with a continuous stream of Skill Checks until the Generator is completed. If any contributing Survivor fails a Skill Check or interrupts the action by any means, The Entity blocks the Generator for {duration} seconds. Merciless Storm can only trigger once per Generator per Trial.
name: Merciless Storm

description: While repairing a Generator, Survivors suffer from the following effects: Incurs the Blindness and Exhausted Status Effects. Both Status Effects linger for {duration} seconds after ending the interaction. Mindbreaker cannot be used to override an existing Exhausted Status Effect, but pauses its timer instead.
name: Mindbreaker

description: While actively chasing a Survivor, Monitor & Abuse applies its primary effect: Increases your Terror Radius by {percentage}%. While not actively chasing a Survivor, Monitor & Abuse applies its secondary effect: Reduces your Terror Radius by {percentage2}%.
name: Monitor & Abuse

description: Whenever a Survivor healing themselves by any means reaches 75 % Healing Progress, No Quarter triggers its effect: The Survivor is faced with a continuous stream of Skill Checks until the Self-Heal is completed. If they fail a Skill Check or interrupt the action by any means, they suffer from the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: No Quarter

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, No Way Out gains +1 Token. Once the Exit Gates are powered, No Way Out activates: Causes the first Survivor to interact with either Exit Gate Switch to trigger a Loud Noise Notification at their location. Upon triggering the Loud Noise Notification, No Way Out calls upon The Entity for the following effect: Blocks both Exit Gate Switches for 12 seconds. This time is extended by an additional {duration} seconds per accumulated Token, up to a combined maximum of {duration2} seconds.
name: No Way Out

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, None Are Free gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 4 Tokens. Once all Generators are completed, None Are Free calls upon The Entity to trigger the following effect: Blocks all Windows and upright Pallets for a stack-able {duration} seconds per Token, up to a maximum of {duration2} seconds.
name: None Are Free

description: Performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator triggers Nowhere to Hide: The Auras of all Survivors within 24 metres of your location are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Nowhere to Hide

description: Whenever a Survivor starts using an Item within 32 metres of your location, Overwhelming Presence triggers its primary effect: Inflicts the Exhausted Status Effect for 15 seconds. Whenever a Survivor within 32 metres of your location becomes Exhausted by any means, Overwhelming Presence triggers its secondary effect: The Aura of whichever Exhausted Survivor is closest to your location is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Overwhelming Presence has a cool-down of 25 seconds.
name: Oppression

description: Performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator applies Overcharge: The next Survivor interacting with that Generator is faced with a difficult Skill Check. Instantly regresses that Generator by {percentage}% of its maximum possible Progression in addition to the default Progression penalty. After Overcharge is applied to a Generator, the following effect also applies: Increases the Regression speed from 85 % to 130 % of its default value over the next 30 seconds.
name: Overcharge

description: Whenever a Survivor within your Terror Radius looks at you, they suffer from the following effects: Causes them to scream and reveal their Aura to you for 2 seconds. Phantom Fear has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Phantom Fear

description: Losing your Obsession in a chase causes See How They Run to gain +1 Token, up to a maximum of 3 Tokens, and performing a Basic or Special Attack with the potential to damage a Survivor causes it to lose -1 Token. While having at least 1 Token, you benefit from the following effect: Grants a stack-able {percentage}% Haste Status Effect per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. See How They Run has a cool-down of 10 seconds between gaining additional Tokens. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: See How They Run

description: After hooking a Survivor, Pop Goes the Weasel activates for {duration} seconds. While active, manually damaging a Generator triggers the following effect: Increases the regression amount by +15 % resulting in 20 % regression. Pop Goes the Weasel deactivates after use or once its timer elapses.
name: Pop Goes the Weasel

description: Whenever you lose a Survivor in a Chase, Predator triggers its effect: Their Aura is revealed to you for 4 seconds. Predator has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Predator

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, Rancor triggers its primary effects: Causes all Survivors to scream and trigger a Loud Noise Notification at their current location. This effect lingers for 3 seconds. Your Aura is revealed to the Obsession for {duration} seconds. Once the Exit Gates are powered, Rancor additionally triggers its secondary effects on the Obsession: Inflicts the Exposed Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial. Grants the ability to kill them when in close proximity. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Rancor

description: You move with a speed and fury that makes blood run cold. You can no longer gain the Bloodlust Status Effect. Successfully hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack grants you a +5 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Rapid Brutality

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, Ravenous gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 4 Tokens. Once you accumulate 4 Tokens, all Survivors suffer from the following effects: Causes them to scream. Inflicts the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Ravenous

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Whenever the Obsession loses a Health State by any means, Remember Me gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens: Increases the Opening time of both Exit Gates by a stack-able 6 seconds per Token, up to a maximum additional Opening time of {duration} seconds. This results in a maximum possible Opening time of {duration2} seconds for both Exit Gates. Remember Me does not apply its penalty to the Obsession, allowing them to open both Exit Gates in the default time of 20 seconds. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Remember Me

description: Damaging any Survivor other than the Obsession with a Basic Attack causes Keep Them Waiting to gain +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. Damaging the Obsession with either a Basic or Special Attack causes Keep Them Waiting to lose -2 Tokens: Grants a stack-able -4 % per Token Cool-down time reduction on successful Basic Attacks, up to a maximum of {percentage}%. Keep Them Waiting freezes its current Token Count once the Obsession is sacrificed or killed. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Keep Them Waiting

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, the following effects apply: The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Floods of Rage

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, the following effects apply: Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect for 90 seconds. After the first time that Survivor is healed back to full health, they suffer from the following effect until they are injured again by any means: Reduces their Action speeds for Healing and Repairing by {percentage}%.
name: Scourge Hook: Gift of Pain

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. While carrying a Survivor, Scourge Hook: Hangman's Trick triggers its primary effect: The Auras of all Survivors within {range} metres of a Scourge Hook are revealed to you. Whenever a Survivor starts the Sabotage action on any Hook, Scourge Hook: Hangman's Trick triggers its secondary effect: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification at the location of that Hook.
name: Scourge Hook: Hangman's Trick

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. Whenever a Survivor is unhooked from a normal Hook, the following effect applies: The Hook is converted into a Scourge Hook. Whenever you hook a Survivor onto a Scourge Hook, the following effect applies: The Aura of the Generator with the most progression is highlighted in yellow for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Jagged Compass

description: At the start of the Trial, the 4 Hooks located inside the Basement and an additional 4 Hooks located throughout the Trial Grounds are all changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of Scourge Hooks are highlighted to you in white. Whenever you are farther than 24 metres from a Survivor hooked onto a Scourge Hook, the following effect applies: Accelerates their Sacrifice Process by {percentage}%.
name: Scourge Hook: Monstrous Shrine

description: Overwhelming pain reverberates outwards. At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. Start the Trial with 4 Token. Whenever a Survivor is hooked onto a Scourge Hook for the first time, Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance consumes -1 Token and applies the following effects: Causes the Generator with the most progression to explode, damaging it. Instantly regresses the Damaged Generator by {percentage}% of its total Progression. Causes the Damaged Generator to start regressing afterwards. Causes all Survivors repairing the Damaged Generator to scream. This does not trigger a Loud Noise Notification. Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance is disabled for the remainder of the Trial once all Tokens are consumed.
name: Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks in the environment are changed into Scourge Hooks: The Auras of these Scourge Hooks are highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, the following effects apply: Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect for 90 seconds. After the first time that Survivor is healed back to full health, they suffer from the following effect until they are injured again by any means: Reduces their Action speeds for Healing and Repairing by {percentage}%.
name: Scourge Hook: Weeping Wounds

description: Whenever a Totem is blessed or cleansed, a random unblocked generator becomes blocked for {duration} seconds. Whenever any number of Generators become blocked, you gain Undetectable Status Effect for 30 seconds.
name: Secret Project

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Healing action while inside the Terror Radius, they suffer from the following effects: Inflicts the Blindness and Exhausted Status Effects. These effects linger for {duration} seconds after the Healing action is interrupted by any means.
name: Septic Touch

description: Whenever you are blinded by any means, Shadowborn triggers its effect: Grants a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: Shadowborn

description: To capture your prey, you must first extinguish their hope. Instead of snuffing Boon Totems you destroy them. Destroying a Boon Totem this way reveals the Auras of all Survivors that were within its range at that moment for {duration} seconds.
name: Shattered Hope

description: Survivors hit with your vicious Basic Attack suffer from the following effects for {duration} seconds: Inflicts the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects. Modifies the potency of Haemorrhage: Increases the Spawn frequency of Pools of Blood by {percentage}%. Increases the Regression rate of partial Healing progression by +25 %.
name: Sloppy Butcher

description: Whenever a Survivor startles a Crow within {range} metres of your location, Spies from the Shadows triggers its effect: Alerts you with a unique Loud Noise Notification in the shape of a Crow. Spies from the Shadows has a cool-down of 5 seconds between alerts.
name: Spies from the Shadows

description: After manually breaking a total of {value} dropped Pallets by any means, Spirit Fury activates: Instantly breaks the next Pallet used by a Survivor to stun you. Spirit Fury deactivates after use and does not affect the duration of the Pallet Stun.
name: Spirit Fury

description: Whenever you are carrying a Survivor, Starstruck activates: Causes all other Survivors in your Terror Radius to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. This effect lingers for {duration} seconds after affected Survivors leave the Terror Radius or Starstruck deactivates. Starstruck deactivates after hooking or dropping the carried Survivor and has a cool-down of 60 seconds.
name: Starstruck

description: You are acutely sensitive to the breathing of your prey. Increases the volume of Grunts of Pain of injured Survivors by {percentage}%. Increases the volume of regular breathing of Survivors by {percentage2}%.
name: Stridor

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Rush Vault action within 12 metres of your location, Superior Anatomy activates: Increases your Vaulting speed by {percentage}%. Superior Anatomy deactivates after vaulting. Superior Anatomy has a cool-down of 25 seconds.
name: Superior Anatomy

description: Whenever you put a Survivor into the Dying State with your Basic Attack, Surge triggers its effect: Causes all Generators within 32 metres of your location to instantly explode and start regressing. Instantly regresses all affected Generators by {percentage}%.
name: Surge

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of damaged Generators are highlighted based on their current state: White Aura: The Generator is currently regressing. Yellow Aura: The Generator stopped regressing due to Survivor-intervention. This effect lasts for {duration} seconds, after which the Generator Aura returns to its default colour. While Survivors are repairing Generators, they suffer from the following effect: Increases the audible range of all noises related to the Repair interaction by +8 metres.
name: Surveillance

description: Start the Trial with 3 Tokens. Whenever you break a Breakable Wall or a dropped Pallet, THWACK! consumes -1 Token and applies the following effect: Causes all Survivors within 36 metres of your location to scream and reveal their Aura for {duration} seconds. Whenever you hook a Survivor, THWACK! is granted +1 Token.
name: THWACK!

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, Terminus activates: Causes all injured, dying, or hooked Survivors to suffer from the Broken Status Effect. This effect last until one of the Exit Gates is opened, after which it lingers for another {duration} seconds.
name: Terminus

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Survivor enters the Basement while you are farther than 24 metres from its entrance, Territorial Imperative activates: The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Territorial Imperative has a cool-down of 45 seconds.
name: Territorial Imperative

description: Whenever at least one Survivor is either injured, dying, or hooked, Thanatophobia activates. While active, all Survivors suffer from the following primary effect: Incurs a stack-able {percentage}% Action-Speed penalty per injured, dying, or hooked Survivor for Cleansing, Repairing, and Sabotaging, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. If all four Survivors are either injured, dying, or hooked, they suffer from the following secondary effect: Increases the penalty by an additional +12 % to a total of {percentage3}%.
name: Thanatophobia

description: After picking up a Survivor, Thrilling Tremors triggers its effects: Blocks all Generators not currently being repaired by any Survivors for 16 seconds. The Auras of Blocked Generators are highlighted to you in white. Thrilling Tremors has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Thrilling Tremors

description: Whenever a Generator is repaired to 70 %, you benefit from the following effects: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for that Generator, revealing its location. Grants the Undetectable Status Effect for the next {duration} seconds. Tinkerer can only trigger once per Generator per Trial.
name: Tinkerer

description: Performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator activates Trail of Torment: Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. The Aura of the Damaged Generator is revealed to all Survivors and highlighted in yellow. Trail of Torment deactivates after the Damaged Generator stops regressing by any means and has a cool-down of {duration} seconds between activations.
name: Trail of Torment

description: After hooking a Survivor, for {duration} seconds, press the Active Ability button to make a target generator within 20 meters explode, lose -10 % progress, and start regressing.
name: Turn Back the Clock

description: Whenever you search a Locker, Ultimate Weapon triggers its effects on all Survivors within 40 metres of its location: Causes them to scream and reveal their location to you. Inflicts the Blindness Status Effect for 30 seconds. Ultimate Weapon has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Ultimate Weapon

description: When a Survivor becomes injured by any means, Unbound activates for {duration} seconds: Vaulting a Window while Unbound is active grants a +7 % Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds. This effect cannot stack with itself.
name: Unbound

description: For every Repair or Healing Skill Check failed by a Survivor, Undone gains +3 Tokens, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. Performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator consumes all accumulated Tokens and applies the following effects: Instantly regresses the Damaged Generator by a stack-able -1 % of its total Progression per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage}%. Blocks the Damaged Generator for 1 second per Token, up to a maximum of {duration} seconds. Causes the Damaged Generator to start regressing once it becomes unblocked. Undone has a cool-down of 60 seconds.
name: Undone

description: After performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator, you benefit from the following effects for {duration} seconds: Transfers your Terror Radius to the damaged Generator. This Terror Radius is set to 32 metres. Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. Unforeseen has a cool-down of 30 seconds.
name: Unforeseen

description: While inside your Terror Radius, Survivors performing Repairing or Healing actions suffer from the following effects: Increases the chances of triggering a Skill Check by +10 %. Reduces the Success zone of those Skill Checks by {percentage}%.
name: Unnerving Presence

description: Basic Attacks benefit from the following effect: Reduces the Cool-down time of missed attacks by {percentage}%.
name: Unrelenting

description: Whenever you start chasing a Survivor, Wandering Eye triggers the following effect: The Auras of all other injured Survivors within 20 metres of your location are revealed to you for 5 seconds. Wandering Eye has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Wandering Eye

description: Whenever an Item is depleted for the first time, it is automatically dropped: The Auras of dropped Survivor Items are revealed to you, as well as the Auras of any Survivors within 12 metres of them. Affected Survivors see the Aura of that Item as well. Causes Survivors picking up a Survivor Item to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Weave Attunement

description: Whenever any Survivor is within {range} metres of your location, Whispers triggers its effect: Causes you to hear the sporadic whispers of The Entity, indicating a Survivor's presence.
name: Whispers

description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of Pallets and Windows are revealed to you within 32 metres. Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, Zanshin Tactics triggers the following effect: Their Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Zanshin Tactics
